events.title: BAILA DEMBOW // AMSTERDAM
events.description: Baila Dembow takes over Oliva for a night of Reggaeton, Dembow, and pure Latin Caribbean energy. Expect CO2 cannons, confetti, and non-stop perreo. ID required.
events.seo_title: Baila Dembow Amsterdam March 2026 - Latin Event at Oliva
events.seo_description: Reggaeton, Dembow and Latin Caribbean energy at Oliva, Rembrandtplein. Tickets from €10.

events.title: BAILA DEMBOW // ROTTERDAM
events.description: A full night of reggaeton, dembow, and Latin club energy. Features artists like Bad Bunny, El Alfa, Feid, Karol G, and Daddy Yankee. Early birds sell out fast!
events.seo_title: Baila Dembow Rotterdam April 2026 - Latin Event at Reverse
events.seo_description: Reggaeton and Dembow party at Reverse Rotterdam. Tickets from €10.

events.title: BAILA DEMBOW // GRONINGEN
events.description: Baila Dembow's FIRST event in Groningen! A full night of reggaeton, dembow, and Latin club energy. Like our sold-out events in Amsterdam, Rotterdam, and London. First edition means first-round ticket prices!
events.seo_title: Baila Dembow Groningen April 2026 - First Latin Event at Huize Maas
events.seo_description: First Baila Dembow event in Groningen! Reggaeton and Dembow at Huize Maas. Tickets from €10.

events.title: BAILA DEMBOW // ROTTERDAM - KONINGSNACHT
events.description: A Latin upgrade for Koningsnacht in Rotterdam! Reggaeton, dembow, and Latin club energy. Bad Bunny, El Alfa, Feid, Karol G, Daddy Yankee all night.
events.seo_title: Baila Dembow Rotterdam Kingsnight 2026 - Koningsnacht Latin Party
events.seo_description: Koningsnacht Latin Party at Reverse Rotterdam. Reggaeton and Dembow. Tickets from €12.

events.title: BAILA DEMBOW XL // IJLAND - KINGSNIGHT 2026
events.description: The XL edition for King's Night in Amsterdam! Six hours of dembow, reggaeton, and Latin sounds. Packed floors, proper sound system. Limited capacity.
events.seo_title: Baila Dembow XL Kingsnight Amsterdam 2026 at IJland
events.seo_description: The XL Kingsnight Latin Event at IJland Amsterdam. Six hours of dembow and reggaeton. Tickets from €15.

events.title: BAILA DEMBOW // LATIN BLOCK PARTY - KONINGSDAG
events.description: Amsterdam's FIRST Latin Block Party for Koningsdag! Outdoor celebration with grills, Latin flavor food, drinks, salsa & bachata with live percussion, and reggaeton.
events.seo_title: Baila Dembow Latin Block Party - Koningsdag 2026 Amsterdam
events.seo_description: FREE Latin Block Party for Koningsdag in Amsterdam. Outdoor celebration with food, music, and perreo.

events.title: BAILA DEMBOW // AMSTERDAM - KONINGSDAG
events.description: King's Day special edition at Oliva! After the street festivities, continue with reggaeton, dembow, and Latin club energy. Bad Bunny, El Alfa, Feid, Karol G, Daddy Yankee.
events.seo_title: Baila Dembow Koningsdag 2026 at Oliva Amsterdam
events.seo_description: Koningsdag Latin Party at Oliva, Rembrandtplein. Reggaeton and Dembow after the street festivities. Tickets from €15.
